'''Grella''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Grella system/Legends|Grella system]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], there were news about a legendary [[Bloodflower]] that bloomed only every one-hundred years. Since the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], no one was witnessing this event anymore.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Bioanalysis|The Bloodflowers}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
